name: NASA C-MAPSS
description: Commercial Modular Aero-Propulsion System Simulation dataset for turbofan engine degradation. Contains run-to-failure simulated data with multiple operating conditions and fault modes.

publications.title: Turbofan Engine Degradation Simulation Data Set
Performance Benchmarking and Analysis of Prognostic Methods for CMAPSS Datasets
publications.venue: Int. J. Prognostics and Health Management

publications.title: Data-Driven Modeling of Aero-Engine Performance Degradation Models
Prognostic and Health Management of Critical Aircraft Systems and Components

name: CWRU Bearing
description: Case Western Reserve University bearing vibration dataset. Accelerometer data collected from bearings with seeded faults at various loads.

name: Bosch Production Line
description: Production line performance data from Bosch. Anonymized measurements from manufacturing processes for predicting internal failures.

name: KITTI Vision
description: Benchmark suite for autonomous driving with stereo, optical flow, visual odometry, 3D object detection and tracking from a driving platform.
source: Karlsruhe Institute of Technology / Toyota Technological Institute

publications.title: Are We Ready for Autonomous Driving? The KITTI Vision Benchmark Suite

name: PURE Requirements
description: Public Requirements dataset containing 79 requirements documents from various public sources, annotated for natural language processing research.

publications.title: PURE: A Dataset of Public Requirements Documents

name: ABC CAD Dataset
description: A Big CAD Model Dataset with 1 million CAD models annotated with ground truth decomposition, sharp features, and surface types for geometric deep learning.

publications.title: ABC: A Big CAD Model Dataset For Geometric Deep Learning

name: Materials Project
description: Open-access database of computed material properties including crystal structures, band structures, and elastic properties for over 150,000 materials.

publications.title: Commentary: The Materials Project: A Materials Genome Approach to Accelerating Materials Innovation

name: National Bridge Inventory
description: Comprehensive database of structural and condition data for all U.S. highway bridges, maintained by FHWA with annual updates.

name: PRONOSTIA Bearings
description: FEMTO-ST Institute bearing degradation dataset from accelerated life tests on bearings under various operating conditions for prognostics research.
notes: Scroll down to item #10 (FEMTO Bearing) on the NASA PCoE page to find the dataset.

publications.authors: Nectoux, P., Gouriveau, R., Medjaher, K., Ramasso, E., Morello, B., Zerhouni, N., Varnier, C.
publications.title: PRONOSTIA: An Experimental Platform for Bearings Accelerated Life Test
publications.venue: IEEE International Conference on Prognostics and Health Management, Denver, CO, USA

name: Hydraulic Systems
description: Condition monitoring dataset of a hydraulic test rig with sensors measuring pressure, volume flow, temperature, vibration, and motor power.
source: ZeMA gGmbH / UCI Machine Learning Repository

publications.title: Condition Monitoring of a Complex Hydraulic System Using Multivariate Statistics
